title: 3.5m Pop-Top Truck Camper
description: The **3.5m Pop-Top Truck Camper** delivers maximum living in a compact package. Pop the roof and you're standing — keep it down and you're aerodynamic. Simple, reliable, purpose-built in Queensland.

title: 4.7m Truck Camper
description: The **4.7m Truck Camper** is built for the big rigs — Iveco Eurocargo, Unimog, Isuzu NPS. Full composite construction in a proper live-aboard layout for the travellers who go furthest.

title: 7ft Electric Pop-Top Slide-On
description: The **7ft Electric Pop-Top** solves the age-old camper dilemma: low enough on the road, tall enough once you're parked. The electric pop-top rises in seconds and gives you full standing room — no more crouching in your own camp.

title: Advent 2150 Hardtop Slide-On
tagline: Compact, capable, and ready to go right now.
description:
The **Advent 2150** is the go-anywhere companion for serious ute and mid-size truck owners. At just 2,150mm base length, it's compact enough for tight tracks but packed with everything you need for weeks away.

Full composite construction keeps the weight down without sacrificing durability. The…

title: Advent 2300 Hardtop Slide-On
tagline: The middle ground — serious capability, serious comfort.
description: The **Advent 2300** sits in the sweet spot of the Advent range — more space than the 2150 without the bulk of the 2450. Ideal for ute owners who want genuine live-aboard capability on longer trips.

title: Advent 2450 Hardtop Slide-On
description: The **Advent 2450** is the flagship of the Advent slide-on range. At 2,450mm base, it provides the most interior space available in a composite slide-on that still mounts cleanly on a dual-cab ute.

title: Isuzu NPS Cabover Camper
tagline: Truck-based expedition capability. More accessible than Unimog, less compromise.
description: The **Isuzu NPS Cabover** gives you serious expedition capability on a platform you can service anywhere in Australia. Full composite body, cabover design for maximum living space, and the Isuzu NPS's proven 4WD drivetrain.

title: Isuzu NPS Pop-Top Camper
tagline: Pop-top freedom on a trusted truck platform.
description: The **Isuzu NPS Pop-Top** delivers expedition-grade capability with the practicality of a pop-top — standing room when you need it, low highway profile when you don't. Built on the proven Isuzu NPS 4WD.

title: Unimog Overlander Camper
tagline: Where roads end, the Unimog begins.
description:
The **Unimog Overlander** is Beyond RV's most extreme build. Mounted on the legendary Mercedes-Benz Unimog with portal axles, this is the expedition vehicle for people who genuinely leave all roads behind.

Full composite body, complete live-aboard spec, custom-built to order. Contact us to discuss…

title: Unimog Pop-Top Camper
tagline: Extreme terrain. Standing room when you arrive.
description: The **Unimog Pop-Top** combines the Unimog's unmatched off-road capability with the practicality of a pop-top roof — low profile on the move, full standing room once you've found your spot.

title: Mercedes Sprinter Motorhome
tagline: The ultimate self-contained adventure vehicle. Custom built on Mercedes Sprinter.
description:
The **Mercedes Sprinter Motorhome** is Beyond RV's flagship build — a complete custom motorhome body on the trusted Mercedes-Benz Sprinter platform. Every component chosen for reliability and comfort on serious Australian roads.

Contact us for the full specification sheet and to discuss your…

title: Sunpatch 12C Couples Caravan
tagline: Compact couples caravan. Big enough for the long haul.
description:
The **Sunpatch 12C** is the entry point to the Sunpatch caravan range — a compact, well-finished couples caravan built on the same full composite principles as the larger 15-XC and 19-XC models.

Two units available for immediate delivery. Contact us to arrange an inspection or discuss fit-out…

title: Sunpatch 15-XC Couples Off-Road Van
tagline: The ultimate couples' off-road caravan. Built tough, finished beautifully.
description:
The **Sunpatch 15-XC** is Beyond RV's most popular couples caravan — and it's easy to see why. Engineered at our Queensland workshop, every 15-XC is built from full composite panels for a lighter, stronger shell that laughs off corrugated outback tracks.

Inside, you'll find a fixed queen island…

title: Sunpatch 19-XC Hardtop Couples Off-Road Van
tagline: Bigger, tougher, and coming soon. Register your interest now.
description:
The **Sunpatch 19-XC Hardtop** is coming. A bigger, better-equipped evolution of our popular 15-XC — hardtop composite construction, expanded living, and the same go-anywhere off-road capability Beyond RV is known for.

Register your interest below and we'll reach out the moment it's ready.

title: Sunpatch 21-XF Hardtop Family Off-Road Van
tagline: Family adventure without compromise. Coming soon.
description: The **Sunpatch 21-XF Hardtop** brings Beyond RV's off-road DNA to families who refuse to leave the kids behind. Coming soon — register your interest and be first in the queue.
